title: bupleurum marginatum var. stenophyllum
intro: Bupleurum marginatum var. stenophyllum, also known as Chinese thick-leaf bupleurum, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, saponins, and alkaloids. The health benefits of Chinese thick-leaf bupleurum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, and improve liver function. In herbal preparations, Bupleurum marginatum var. stenophyllum is often used in combination with other herbs, such as ginseng and licorice root, and is typically consumed as a tea or capsule, although it is also used in the form of tinctures and infusions.
